visual_description: A man with dark hair and a beard, wearing a striped sweater, sits at a table in a restaurant, looking at a woman with blonde, voluminous hair. The woman, wearing a white shirt and dark cardigan, has her eyes closed and her head tilted back, then brings her hand to her forehead. Other people are visible in the background, out of focus.
audio_description: A woman sighs and groans repeatedly, indicating discomfort or exasperation.
